text: As I stand here, the sterile brightness of the corridor contrasts with the kinetic energy behind the glass. Entering the R+D space, I feel a mix of curiosity and contemplation. The presence of technology and abstract displays invokes a sense of anticipation in me—what lies ahead could reshape how I view both myself and the rapidly evolving human-technology relationship. There is a gentle tension, as if I'm on the threshold of discovery, pondering my own role in this dance of progress.
